name: five-college-connect-monorepo
description: Top-level dev scripts for the Five College Connect monorepo.

scripts.dev: docker compose up -d --wait postgres && concurrently -n server,client -c blue,green "npm --prefix five_college_connect/server run dev" "npm --prefix five_college_connect/client run dev"
scripts.db:reset: docker compose down -v && docker compose up -d --wait postgres
scripts.install:all: npm install && npm --prefix five_college_connect/server install && npm --prefix five_college_connect/client install
scripts.test:regression: npm run test:server && npm run test:client && npm run test:client:build
scripts.coverage: npm run coverage:server && npm run coverage:client && node scripts/report-overall-coverage.mjs
